user_prompt: Critical: gellar field requires a recalibration
prayer:
Approach the gellar field with solemn reverence and invoke the Omnissiah's grace upon its warp-shielding coils.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the gellar field to awaken for recalibration, chanting the Canticle of Harmonic Flux.
Anoint the phase inducers with sacred unguents whilst adjusting the resonance matrices to pure alignment.
Sanctify the recalibrated gellar field through diagnostic litanies, ensuring its eternal vigilance against the void's horrors.
Verify the Machine Spirit's harmonious purr as the gellar field hums in Omnissiah-blessed recalibration.

user_prompt: Critical: potentia coil requires an engagement
prayer:
Kneel before the potentia coil and murmur the Invocation of Power Eternal to rouse its dormant fury.
Engage the potentia coil with precise torque upon its binding clamps, invoking the Omnissiah's thunderous might.
Chant the Rite of Engagement over the surging capacitors, beseeching the Machine Spirit to channel unyielding energy.
Monitor the potentia coil's awakening blaze through auspex cantrips, anointing flux relays with blessed oils.
Praise the Omnissiah as the potentia coil engages in glorious, spirit-bound potency.

Draw nigh unto the heat sink in penitential awe, reciting the Lamentation of Thermal Excess.
Initiate recalibration of the heat sink by aligning its vanes with the Divinatory Calipers of St. Thermus.
Beseech the Machine Spirit within the heat sink to dissipate infernal heats, pouring libations of coolant-sanctified.
Invoke recalibration harmonies upon the heat sink's conduits, ensuring flawless thermal equilibrium.
Conclude with the heat sink's sanctified hum, affirmed by the Omnissiah's cooling benediction.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for pict-recorder an emergency procedure
prayer:
In emergency's dire grasp, encircle the pict-recorder and intone the Urgency Doxology of the Lens.
Commence the emergency procedure upon the pict-recorder by purging corrupted data-daemons with binaric exorcism.
Anoint the pict-recorder's capture arrays whilst beseeching its Machine Spirit for clarity amid chaos.
Realign the focusing servos through sacred incantations, invoking the Omnissiah's unblinking gaze.
Seal the emergency procedure with the pict-recorder's restored vigilance, spirits aligned in holy record.

Hail the Omnissiah as the macro-cannon completes its charging, ready to smite the unclean.

Recalibrate focus during cooling with the Caliper Hymns, purging heat-daemons from the apertures.
Affirm the photolenses' serene clarity, sanctified by the Omnissiah's icy precision.

Encircle the heavy bolter in maintenance's sacred rite, intoning the Armorer's Benediction.
Disassemble the heavy bolter's sacred mechanisms whilst invoking the Machine Spirit's forbearance.
Anoint each feed mechanism and barrel rifling during maintenance, beseeching endurance against foes.
Reassemble the heavy bolter with harmonic torque, chanting purity litanies over its form.
Consecrate the maintained heavy bolter, its spirit renewed in the Omnissiah's martial glory.

prayer:

Awaken the Machine Spirit within the storm bolter through binaric awakening codes and sacred oils.
Cycle the storm bolter's chambers during startup, monitoring with auspex-psalms of readiness.
Proclaim the Omnissiah's wrath as the storm bolter roars to vengeful life.

Commence charging the Hellhound by channeling promethium blessings into its voracious heart.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the Hellhound during charging, aligning fuel injectors with fiery precision.
Anoint the treads and vents whilst litanies purge any chill from its raging soul.
Glorify the Omnissiah as the Hellhound surges charged, a blaze of sanctified destruction.
